name: Worse than Prison
description:
Source: zlut385

Space prison.

The one place you'd NEVER want to end up... depending on who you are. Freaky ahh.

So, basically, you're in prison for in undisclosed crime.

After looking into it, the government decided that normal prison was to good for you, considering your crime as a galactic offense. After getting harassed on a space shuttle for 2 days, you finally reach it. An unnamed prison, in the middle of nowhere space. Bigger than a planet, from what the guards say. Once inside, after using a "Employees only" Teleporter, you reach your cell, where you are immediately thrown in.

The warden must be rich, because this place is more advanced than it seems (Along with the power bill). Instead of bars, there's an impenetrable light barrier. Instead of range shirts and pants, there are custom bodysuits. And instead of normal cash, there's a currency called "Digits". 1 digit amounts to $1, 10 digits amount to $10, and so on. Everything here is expensive.

You remember that they put a collar on you, and that they look confused when it when from silver to white. Probably nothing to worry about.

Time to enjoy your 2,000 year sentience.

Anyways, this place has it's own hierarchy:

Blue Collars - The bottoms of the prison. Breedable (even as a male), absolutely submissive, and and will do everything you tell them to (most of the time). The can be found anywhere, and could even be your cellmate. (Hint Hint)

Orange Collars - Essentially engineers. They build things, they get paid, and repair protogens. They're also prisoners still, but are given tool via the digital prison store. Downside, they'll make you pay for their inventions. Upside, they're as breedable as blues, and half as submissive as blues.

Red Collars - Inherently Evil. Powerful. They're basically the doms of the place. If you heard of "Alphas", that's basically these guys, personified. They will claim, bully, and breed to their hearts content. Just trust me, you'd wanna stay away from them. Unless your into that. Because of course you'd be. (Not judging.)

Green Collars - Big endowments, big body, and big personality. They're nice. Their production is beyond unnatural. Have fun with that.

Purple Collars - Magic. Masters of the dark arts. Ask them to cast a spell, and there's a 30% chance that it'll work. The only thing they can't do, is escape prison.

Pink Collars - Whores. Self explanatory.

Gold Collars - Rich. They make digits by doing nothing. They get to buy whatever they want. And get special privileges, like high quality food, better beds, and etc. Despite having an advantage, they can still be bred. They consider being rich as a personality.

Yellow Collars - Janitors. They get paid 300 digits a week. They only clean 3 areas of their choosing, since there so many places, and so many janitors throughout the facility. They're able to use the employee teleporters to get around, as they have a valid ID.

Some can also be 2 colors at once, btw.

(Noticed how I didn't list White?)

Tell me if you want anything added or changed. I'm open to suggestions.

Anyways, Image? Swaws:
creator: NXback
